name: Dakghor
overview: Damodar Das comes to the remote village of Hagda as its new postmaster. While their simple aspirations and pure emotions slowly do away with Damodar's reservations, he keeps searching for a sliver of his long-lost childhood.

trailers.title: Trailer - Dakghor (ডাকঘর) | Ditipriya, Suhotra | 24th Feb | Abhrajit Sen | hoichoi
